name: generate-api-pdf
description: CLI tool to generate professional API documentation PDFs from OpenAPI JSON specs

scripts.test:gateway: node bin/generate-api-pdf.mjs -i ../lts-platform/docs/api/output/gateway-openapi.json -c "Light Up Total" -p "LTS Platform GatewayAPI"
scripts.test:master-data: node bin/generate-api-pdf.mjs -i ../lts-platform/docs/api/output/master-data-openapi.json -c "Light Up Total" -p "LTS Platform MasterDataAPI"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:gateway && npm run test:master-data
